android.webkit.WebView.text: Treasury Secretary Gets Pulled From Interview To See Trump, Comes Back Rattled

android.widget.TextView.heading: true

android.view.View.text: America First, Cheap Gas Last | HuffPost

android.widget.Button.content-desc: Video - America First, Cheap Gas Last

android.widget.TextView.text: ’s Situation Room in the middle of an interview Thursday and came back a tad tense.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: The secretary was discussing Japanese economics with “The Master Investor” host Wilfred Frost of Sky News when an aide told Bessent offscreen, “Sorry, the president wants you right away.”
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
